__info.description: Customize all ingame messages, alerts, and formatting here. Supports MiniMessage formatting tags.

update-checker.running-latest: <white>You are running the latest version of <plugin_name>!
update-checker.update-found-console:
<white>An update was found for <plugin_name>!
    <white>Current version: <red>v<version_current>
    <white>Latest version: <green><click:open_url:'<download_link>'><hover:show_text:'<green>Open Download Page'>v<version_latest></hover></click>
update-checker.update-found-player:
<white>An update was found for <plugin_name>!
  <dark_gray>• <white>Current version: <red>v<version_current>
  <dark_gray>• <white>Latest version: <green><click:open_url:'<download_link>'><hover:show_text:'<green>Open Download Page'>v<version_latest></hover></click>

killcash.help:
<green>--- KillCash Help ---</green>
<gold>/killcash stats [player]</gold> - <gray>View player statistics</gray>
<gold>/killcash balance [player]</gold> - <gray>View player economy balance</gray>
<gold>/killcash pay <player> <amount></gold> - <gray>Pay another player</gray>
<gold>/killcash baltop</gold> - <gray>View top 10 player balances</gray>
<gold>/killcash give <player(s)/all/*> <amount></gold> - <gray>Give currency to player(s)</gray>
<gold>/killcash take <player(s)/all/*> <amount></gold> - <gray>Take currency from player(s)</gray>
<gold>/killcash convert <amount></gold> - <gray>Convert KillCash to server economy</gray>
<gold>/killcash reload [config|lang|all]</gold> - <gray>Reload plugin</gray>
killcash.only-players: <red>This command can only be executed by players.</red>

stats.other-offline:
<white> <color:#ff0000>[ <white><bold>PvP Statistics<reset> <color:#ff0000>]

<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>Name: <player> &7(Offline) 
<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>Kills: N/A 
<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>Deaths: N/A 
<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>K/D Ratio: N/A 
<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>Killstreak: N/A 
<white> <color:#ff0000>■ <white>Kill Cash: N/A

pay.insufficient-funds: <red> Not enough Kill Cash to pay <color:#ffff00>$<amount><red>. (Current balance: <color:#ffff00>$<balance><red>)
pay.invalid-amount: <red>The amount must be a positive number.</red>

give.invalid-amount: <red> The amount must be a positive number.</red>
give.no-players: <red> No online players found to give money to.</red>

take.success-receiver: <red> An admin took <gold>$<amount></gold> from your balance.</red>
take.invalid-amount: <red> The amount must be a positive number.</red>
take.no-players: <red> No online players found to take money from.</red>

convert.invalid-amount: <red> The amount must be a positive number.</red>
convert.min-amount: <red> You must convert at least <gold><min></gold> Kill Cash.</red>
convert.insufficient-funds: <red> Insufficient Kill Cash balance! You only have <gold><balance></gold> KillCash.</red>
convert.vault-error: <red> Error: Connection to server economy failed. Contact an admin.</red>
convert.success: <green><bold> SUCCESS!</bold> Converted <gold><amount> Kill Cash</gold> into <green>$<payout></green> server money.</green>
convert.error-processing: <red> An error occurred while processing the transaction. Please try again.</red>

pvp.anti-abuse-cooldown: <red> You killed <white><victim></white> too recently. No reward issued.
pvp.anti-abuse-same-ip: <red>You cannot earn rewards for killing players on the same network.
pvp.anti-abuse-playtime: <red> Player <white><victim></white> does not have enough playtime. No reward issued.
pvp.streak-active: <green> You are currently on a <gold><streak></gold> killstreak!
